headline: Board Certified Chaplain at Bluff City Medical Center | Radio Host, WGSP 1490 AM | Pastoral Care & Spiritual Wellness
summary: I walk with people through the hardest moments of their lives - grief, diagnosis, dying, and the sacred space in between. Fifteen years as a chaplain at Bluff City Medical Center have taught me that presence is the most powerful thing we can offer. On Saturday mornings I host Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM, where I bring that same pastoral care to 8,000+ listeners across the Memphis area. Board Certified Chaplain (APC). MDiv, Memphis Divinity School. Rooted in Memphis. Growing every day.
